_note: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout/examples/office-open-plan. 20 LED_PANEL_600 (4500 lm each) on a 4×5 uniform grid in a 10×8 m open-plan office; all 9 INVs PASS. 10-sample slice from the 99-point grid; full grid emitted by runtime calc.lumen_grid_solver. Demonstrates the happy-path cascade for the lighting-layout legacy v1.3 example.

ies_files._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 4500lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.

grid_metadata.grid_spacing_formula: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §6.2 adaptive: p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(d) clamped [50, 1000] mm; for d=9.0m task area: p ≈ 0.2 × 5^0.954 × 1000 ≈ 929 mm → snapped to nominal 900 mm. Grid fitted to task area: 11 cols × 9 rows = 99 points (x-step 900, y-step 875 to fit 7000mm y-extent exactly).

reflectances._source: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 clean office reflectances (0.7/0.5/0.2) — matches lighting-layout assumptions[0].

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout office-open-plan example. 20 LED_PANEL_600 (4500 lm) on uniform 4×5 grid produce achieved_avg 603 lux ≥ 500 target with achieved_min 472 lux ≥ 350 (0.7×500); U₀ 0.78 ≥ 0.6 office target; max UGR 17.9 ≤ 19. All 9 INVs PASS. Intent payload sets task_area_compliant=true for upstream lighting-layout INV-11.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Consumes electrical/lighting-layout/examples/office-open-plan/intent-out.json — legacy v1.3 single-circuit example. Photometric-analysis verifies per-point illuminance and UGR that the lumen-method INV-1 cannot enforce. The lighting-layout calc reports achieved_illuminance_lux=603 (room average); photometric-analysis confirms the per-point distribution behind that average is also compliant.

sections.title: Grid resolution derivation
sections.summary: Task area 9×7 m after 500mm border per BS EN 12464-1 §4.3. d=9m; corrected §6.2 formula p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(9) × 1000 ≈ 929 mm snapped to 900 mm nominal per [grid-spacing-rules#adaptive-formula]. 11×9 = 99 grid points (x-step 900, y-step 875).

sections.title: Per-point illuminance
sections.summary: achieved_avg 603 lux (21% margin over 500 target — modest design margin reflecting the 4500 lm panel choice). achieved_min 472 lux at NW corner (500, 7500); well above the 0.7×500 = 350 threshold. Lambertian distribution from synthetic LED_PANEL_600-4500lm.ies gives smooth fall-off near walls.

sections.title: UGR per CIE 117
sections.summary: 4 default observers per [ugr-rules#default-observer-positions]; max UGR 17.9 (auto_S_wall observer facing the 4-panel south row). 19 office limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 open_plan_office; PASS with 1.1 margin.

sections.title: Cascade signal
sections.summary: Intent payload sets task_area_compliant=true and non_compliance_flags=[]; lighting-layout INV-11 reads these and PASSes its post-D.1 photometric verification check (sub-checks 1–4 per spec §10.3). Office-open-plan upstream proceeds to sign-off without a photometric blocker.

sections.title: Honest disclosure
sections.summary: IES file verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py from a Lambertian archetype, NOT manufacturer-measured. Engineer-of-record must substitute project IES before final design freeze per [ies-provenance-rules#substitution-policy]. Reviewer D-2 will flag this at stage D if not substituted.

invariants.evidence: Achieved min 472 lux ≥ 0.7 × target 500 = 350 lux per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 + §4.4. Cold point at (500, 7500) NW corner; 122 lux margin over threshold.
Achieved U₀ = 472/603 = 0.783 ≥ 0.6 office target per [ugr-rules#per-room-type-limits] open_plan_office. Spatial distribution from synthetic Lambertian IES across the uniform 4×5 grid is smooth.
Max UGR 17.9 (auto_S_wall observer at (5000, 1500)) ≤ 19 office limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 open_plan_office. 1.1 margin.
1 distinct luminaire_type (LED_PANEL_600) in upstream lighting-layout consumed_summary; 1 ies_files[] entry matches; LM-63 parser returns total_lumens=4500 + max_intensity_cd=1390.
grid_spacing_mm=900 matches BS EN 12464-1 §6.2 formula output p ≈ 929 mm within ±50 mm tolerance. d=9.0m task area.
illuminance_grid.length (full runtime emission) = point_count=99. 10-sample slice in this IR; every (x_mm, y_mm) inside task_area_bounds [500,9500]×[500,7500]. No duplicate coordinates.
4 ugr_results entries with _source=cie_117_default (N, S, E, W wall-facing per [ugr-rules#default-observer-positions]). No engineer overrides supplied in inputs.ugr_view_positions_override[].
ies_files[0]._source length=262 chars ≥ 40 minimum; verification_status=synthetic_reference_C3 in enum per [ies-provenance-rules#verification-status-enum].
